text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I did it. I finally managed to buy a latte and
bring it back here safe and sound!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time I haven't spilt it... At last, I
can drink in peace!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wh-wh-why is it so bitter?! Wait, this is
black coffeeeee!
